race.comment: BELLA PIETRA (11) goes on top. She resumes here off a long spell which is the query but she's a progressive filly for the Hayes yard who looked very good knocking off her maiden at Pakenham dominantly before a spell, if she's right to go here from the gun draw she'll go close. KOOLATAH QUEEN (14) tried hard in a BM56 at Mornington last time as a well-backed commodity, beaten under a length. Stays at 1200m but that could actually suit off last time, keeping safe. JAMESJOHNO (4) resumes. He's a consistent sort who was in the placings in both runs last time in. He's only off a short break and draws ideally, he should land in a good spot and take beating. BARARI (8) won well at Pakenham in this grade last time out and looks well placed to go again. ZOULETTE (5) has upside off a narrow win fresh and she can go on with it.
